draft.rationale: Complete both turn_10 and close_loop using a single circular-arc connect_ports action. draft.rationale: Slightly shift the midpoint outwards along the perpendicular bisector to target a 10.05mm bend radius instead of exactly 10.0mm. This resolves the micro-tolerance under-run (where numerical roundoff yielded a 9.9997mm radius, violating the 10.0mm minimum curvature radius constraint) while keeping the arc fully compatible with both target ports.

draft.rationale: Slightly adjust the midpoint coordinates to [1.90983, -5.87785, 0.0] using 5-decimal precision. This analytical correction achieves an exact bend_radius of 10.00011mm (which is strictly greater than the 10.0mm minimum_curvature_radius, avoiding any self-intersection/invalid sweep errors) while preserving the exact 72-degree sweep angle and matching both target port tangents within 0.01%.
